text: Fifty gold into a pot of one twenty-five?
Oh, Concetta, darling, do take your time—I'm sure those pieces are simply burning a hole in your pocket.
Concetta, darling, don’t let that pitiful stack scare you into folding.
Concetta, my dear, don’t let your wallet hold you back — what’s the plan?
Come on, Farrah, don't be shy — your pile of gold won't grow itself.
Oh, Dinvaya, darling, tick-tock—do you even have the guts to open, or are you just here for the spectacle?
